description: Resource schema for AWS Artifact Report

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the report.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the report.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

---

Read only property: Yes

Required: No

Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Read only property: Yes
